source: User-pasted Google Maps listing and menus for Madra Rua Irish Pub
notes: User approved Madra Rua Irish Pub for both locations (Park Circle and Summerville).
Lunch, dinner, and brunch menus were pasted from the restaurant and analyzed.
Menu explicitly notes: 'We use peanut oil (no trans fat or cholesterol).'

locations.address: 1034 E Montague Ave, N. Charleston, SC 29405

menuHighlights: Traditional Irish fare: Irish stew, fish & chips, shepherd's pie, corned beef & cabbage, fisherman's pie
Sandwiches: Madra Rua beef burger, Rua Reuben, grilled chicken sandwich, prime rib of beef sandwich, pulled pork sandwich
Jumbo Wicklow wings with sauce/dry rub choices: Buffalo, Dry Ranch, Mango Habanero, BBQ, Lemon Pepper
Menu explicitly states: 'We use peanut oil (no trans fat or cholesterol).'
Weekend brunch: two egg breakfast, build your own omelet, breakfast bowls, benedicts, shrimp & grits, biscuits & gravy, BLT sandwiches
allergyNote: Kitchen uses peanut oil for frying (not a concern for this household, but noted for reference).
